notes: Solid, complete Breakout implementation with proper state machine, angle-based paddle bouncing, speed scaling, and all game states; minor issue is bricks lack padding/gap visual separation and no shimmer/gradient effects, but overall very playable and nearly bug-free.
An exceptionally well-crafted Breakout clone with robust collision detection, perfect paddle bounce angles, and polished game states, with only a microscopic off-center brick layout flaw.
A solid and mostly complete Breakout clone, but collision handling and state/control design are basic and likely to produce occasional unfair or non-classic behavior.
